issues.title: Feature 1: Declarative YAML Workflow Definition
test_steps: workflow-mcp parse --file example.yaml -> Outputs JSON DAG representation.
workflow-mcp validate --file bad.yaml -> Returns exit code 1 with error message.
workflow-mcp visualize --file example.yaml -> Generates Mermaid diagram saved to out.png.

issues.title: Feature 2: Real-time Agent Execution Monitoring
test_steps: workflow-mcp monitor --workflow example -> Streams JSON lines to stdout.
workflow-mcp monitor --workflow example --format prometheus -> Exposes :workflow_steps_total metric.
workflow-mcp monitor --workflow example --test -> Simulates a failure and verifies alert emission.

issues.title: Feature 3: Extensible SDK Integration (Copilot)
test_steps: copilot_sdk load_skill --name summarizer -> Loads module and returns handle.
copilot_sdk run_skill --handle h --input {"text":"long article"} -> Returns summarized text.
copilot_sdk list_skills -> Prints available skill names.
